overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long SBUX Daily ETF (SBU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) stock, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses derivatives to pursue its objective SBU was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
